Spencer: C. Martinez, Esq. of Phillips. Erlewine & Given, 415-398-0900 for Plaintiff, James O. Siegel III
Ali Pasha Hamidi, Esq. of Liner Yankelevitz Sunshine & Regenstreif, 415-489-7700 for Defendant/Moving Party, David Corso & Integrated Marketing Network

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto and Joyce Long.
Spencer Martinez, Esq. for Plaintiff: James O. Siegel, also present.
Plaintiff's witness: Brian McDonald and David Corso are present.
Ali Pash Hamidi, Esq. for Defendants: David Corso and Integrated Marketing Network, LLC., is present in court.
Parties and witnesses were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations and statement of case and for damages against defendants, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: David Corso and Integrated Marketing Network, LLC. as follows:
Compensatory damages $299,589.00
Punitive damages $50,000.00
Interest at the rate of 10% per annum.
Costs of $10,238.00
Judgment signed in open court.
